reasoning: The NIST SC-5(2) control focuses on denial-of-service protection through capacity, bandwidth, and redundancy management. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed by implementing NetworkPolicies to limit traffic, configuring API server rate limiting to prevent abuse, leveraging service mesh capabilities for traffic management and resilience, and using cluster autoscaling to manage resource capacity and redundancy.
title: Denial-Of-Service Protection - Denial - of - service protection | capacity , bandwidth , and redundancy manage
